children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall establish within the Department a natural products research program.

research to improve human health and agricultural productivity through the discovery, development, and commercialization of products and agrichemicals from bioactive natural products, including products from plant, marine, and microbial sources;
research to characterize the botanical sources, production, chemistry, and biological properties of plant-derived natural products; and
other research priorities identified by the Secretary.
determine the relevance and merit of research under this section through a system of peer review established by the Secretary pursuant to ; andsection 7613 of this title
approve funding for research on the basis of merit, quality, and relevance to advancing the purposes of this section.

children.heading: Buildings and facilities
children.label: d Buildings and facilities
children.text: Funds made available under this section shall not be used for the construction of a new building or facility or the acquisition, expansion, remodeling, or alteration of an existing building or facility (including site grading and improvement and architect fees).

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: e Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $7,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2023.
